title: calamagrostis purpurea subsp. tenuis
intro: Calamagrostis purpurea subsp. tenuis, also known as slender tufted grass, is a subspecies of the purple meadow grass, a type of perennial grass that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis purpurea subsp. tenuis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to herbal remedies, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal preparations.
